hero.subtitle: The ultimate platform bridging the gap between blood donors, hospitals, and Thalassemia patients with lightning-fast real-time matching.

mission.title: No one should die waiting for blood.
mission.p1: Every second counts during a medical emergency. Our mission is to eliminate the severe communication delays between blood banks, voluntary donors, and critical patients across the nation.
mission.quote: We leverage smart algorithms and real-time alerts to ensure that life-saving blood reaches the right person at the right time.
mission.urgentDesc: Instantly broadcast requirements to nearby eligible donors.
mission.verifiedDesc: 100% verified hospitals and PMDC registered doctors.

step1.title: Register Account
step1.desc: Sign up securely as a Donor, Patient, Doctor, or Hospital.

step2.title: Get Verified
step2.desc: Complete your profile. Professionals verify their licenses.

step3.title: Smart Match
step3.desc: Our algorithm instantly connects requests with compatible donors.

step4.title: Save Lives
step4.desc: Coordinate donations seamlessly and track your impact.

features.title: Powerful Features
features.subtitle: A robust suite of tools designed to make blood donation seamless, secure, and highly efficient.

match.title: Real-Time Matching
match.desc: Advanced algorithms automatically match blood requests with the nearest eligible donors.

alerts.title: Instant Alerts
alerts.desc: Push notifications ensure that urgent requirements are seen immediately by the community.

inventory.title: Inventory Tracking
inventory.desc: Hospitals can digitally manage their blood bank stock, tracking expiries and shortages.

security.title: Secure Architecture
security.desc: Built with enterprise-grade JWT strategy and role-based access control for maximum privacy.

wellness.title: Wellness Tracking
wellness.desc: Donors can track their donation history and post-donation health recovery metrics.

scheduling.title: Smart Scheduling
scheduling.desc: Book donation appointments directly with hospitals to avoid long waiting queues.

roles.title: Dedicated Dashboards
roles.subtitle: We provide tailored experiences with specialized tools for every participant in the healthcare cycle.

donor.title: Donors
donor.text: Track donations, view wellness, and receive urgent requests.

patient.title: Patients
patient.text: Request blood instantly and track matches in real-time.

hospital.title: Hospitals
hospital.text: Manage blood bank inventory and verify donor health.

doctor.title: Doctors
doctor.text: Oversee patient treatments and validate thalassemia records.

thalassemia.title: Dedicated Thalassemia Support
thalassemia.p1: Thalassemia major patients require regular, lifelong blood transfusions. Sourcing fresh blood every month is a monumental challenge for families.
list: Dedicated donor pools for specific patients

security.title: Bank-Grade Security & Trust
security.p1: Medical data is highly sensitive. We employ state-of-the-art security measures to ensure that your identity and medical records remain 100% private.

jwt.title: JWT Authentication
jwt.desc: Stateless, encrypted token strategy ensuring secure sessions.

pmdc.title: PMDC Verification
pmdc.desc: All doctors must provide valid PMDC licenses for approval.

rbac.title: Role Isolation
rbac.desc: Strict RBAC prevents unauthorized access to medical records.

q1.a: Any healthy individual aged 18-65, weighing at least 50kg, and meeting standard medical criteria can donate.

q2.a: Yes, we use advanced JWT encryption and never share your contact details publicly. Communication happens via secure in-app alerts.

q3.q: How do hospitals use this platform?
q3.a: Hospitals get a dedicated inventory dashboard to manage their blood bank, broadcast shortages, and verify patient records.

q4.a: Absolutely. BloodSync is a 100% free platform dedicated to serving humanity.

footer.tagline: Developed as a Final Year Project. Empowering communities through technology.
